widgets_values: grossup, an extreme close-up of a surreal and unsettling food item resting on a surface. A standard, sesame-seed-topped molded hamburger bun sits atop a grotesque, fleshy mass that appears like a raw internal organ, composed of vascular, organic-looking tissue. This pink, bloody, pulsating-looking mound is textured with intricate red vein patterns, numerous dark pits, and a small, hollow opening at one end. A thin, viscous, red fluid leaks from beneath the mass onto the surface. The background is a dark, mottled green background, which emphasizes the visceral, biological, and disturbing appearance of the central object.

subgraphs.description: Sharpens image details using a GPU fragment shader for enhanced clarity.

subgraphs.description: Balances colors across shadows, midtones, and highlights using a real-time GPU fragment shader.
